name: Gemini OAuth (Cloud Code Assist)
description: Google Gemini via OAuth — uses Google's gemini-cli OAuth flow to access Cloud Code Assist (cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com). Run 'opencomputer auth login google' once to authenticate. NOTE: the Cloud Code Assist transport adapter is a follow-up; this plugin currently ships the OAuth credential layer only.

providers.label: Gemini OAuth (uses Google account — opens browser for consent)
